parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix - for descending. Allowed: id, status, fulfillment_type, tracking_number, cost, fulfilled_at, packing_slip_printed_at, created_at, updated_at

parameters.name: filter[fulfillment_type]
parameters.description: Filter by fulfillment type (shipstation, shipfusion, fba, etc.)

parameters.name: filter[archived]
parameters.description: Include archived fulfillments (omit to exclude archived)
